title: Simple. Concrete. Tailored to you.
description: No technical jargon, no training required. I start from your daily routine to build solutions that just work.

steps.title: I start from your daily routine
steps.description: Tell me what takes up your time. What frustrates you, what you'd like to automate. That's the only question that matters.

steps.title: I build your solution
steps.description: Tailored to your business, your tools, the way you work. Not something generic — something built for you.

steps.title: I set it up and it works
steps.description: You don't have to learn anything. I set everything up, show you in 5 minutes, and if it breaks, I'm here.
